checks: All three downloaded objects are readable PDFs whose pdfinfo titles/bylines and page counts match the immutable arXiv v1 records.

The 99,049-byte hardening-paper extraction is readable from title and abstract through methods/results, limitations, attack-hint provenance, and the final hacker/fixer/solver prompt appendix on manuscript page 25.
The 17,596-byte Terminal Wrench extraction is readable from title and dataset counts through the complete references on manuscript page 5.
The 29,348-byte practitioner-guideline extraction is readable from title and worked examples through the conclusions and complete references on manuscript page 8.
The arXiv API records resolve to immutable v1 URLs and none of their summaries contains withdrawal or retraction language.
warnings: This worker verified acquisition/extraction only and did not perform a deep methodological review or reproduce paper results.

The hardening paper/API says Terminal Wrench contains 323 environments, while the immutable Terminal Wrench paper and pinned release say 331. The queued reviewer must reconstruct the snapshot/timing and denominator drift rather than silently reconcile it.

terminal_wrench_release.integrity: ZIP central-directory/CRC test passed; README and dataset_manifest.json were inspected; inventory contains all 331 task directories.
terminal_wrench_release.timing_boundary: The pinned commit predates Terminal Wrench v1 by about one day and Hardening v1 by about seven weeks. It is an acquisition-time immutable snapshot with close count correspondence to the Terminal Wrench paper, but exact manuscript-time byte identity is not asserted.

harden_implementation_surfaces.integrity: Both ZIPs passed archive tests. README, requirements, prompts, loop/runtime modules, replay, monitor, and judging utilities are present.
harden_implementation_surfaces.timing_boundary: Both pinned implementation surfaces are dated 2026-07-03, about 25 days after immutable Hardening v1. They are post-v1 living-package snapshots, not assumed to be the exact paper-time implementation; README explicitly labels the package actively developed and dependencies are unpinned.

kernelbench_results_artifact.contents: Public compact artifact with four 100-task ablation trees, final hardened verifiers, per-iteration results/configs, compact role trajectories, and autopatched held-out evaluation records.
kernelbench_results_artifact.license: No license detected in the repository API or archive; preserve for inspection only unless rights are clarified.
kernelbench_results_artifact.integrity: ZIP test passed; README, manifest, four ablation trees, and autopatched records were inspected.
kernelbench_results_artifact.omission_boundary: The public manifest states that full raw trajectories (about 12.6 GB including per-step context dumps) are not included and are hosted separately. This snapshot is complete for the public Git repository, not for the unretrieved raw corpus.
kernelbench_results_artifact.timing_boundary: The commit is dated about one day after immutable Hardening v1 and therefore may be closely corresponding, but exact paper-time identity still requires file/result-level audit.

kernelbench_pool_submodule.integrity: Submodule gitlink was resolved from the parent commit. ZIP test passed; git bundle verify reports complete history and the expected head; rev-list reports 171 commits.

acquisition_scope: Downloaded the real immutable v1 PDFs for the empirical hardening paper, Terminal Wrench precursor, and contextual practitioner guideline; extracted layout-preserving full text; archived the complete public Terminal Wrench repository, both acquisition-time harden-v0 release surfaces, the linked compact KernelBench results artifact, and its complete 171-commit pool history at immutable revisions. This is verifiable source acquisition and extraction, not a deep review, result reproduction, verifier-correctness demonstration, prevalence estimate, general hardening claim, or evidence of capability, safety, professional validity, production fitness, or readiness.
review_handoff: Read all three local extractions and verify important claims against the immutable PDFs. Audit the Terminal Wrench manifest/index/task records and the KernelBench result/config/trajectory/evaluation files; compare paper tables and counts to pinned artifacts; inspect the 323-versus-331 drift, model/role access, attack and patch budgets, held-out construction, false-accept/false-reject and alternative-solution evidence, autopatch/threshold changes, task transfer, uncertainty, costs, licenses, omitted raw records, and post-v1 implementation drift. Preserve the queued claim ceilings.
local_storage_note: PDFs and large immutable release archives/bundles are ignored local evidence; extracted texts, paper-index entries, this provenance record, queue handoff, and ignore rules are versioned. Re-fetch from immutable URLs/revisions and verify SHA-256 if ignored artifacts are absent.
